# Purely Canadian Movers Inc.

> Purely Canadian Movers Inc. is a family-owned, BBB Accredited moving company based in Coquitlam, British Columbia, Canada. Founded in 1991, we have served Metro Vancouver and the Lower Mainland for over 30 years. We never use subcontractors â€” every move is handled by our own trained, vetted employees.

## About

Purely Canadian Movers Inc. is one of Metro Vancouver's most trusted moving companies. We are a member of the Great Canadian Van Lines network, which provides access to a nationwide fleet and partner network for long-distance and cross-country moves. We are BBB Accredited, fully licensed, and insured.

- **Founded:** 1991
- **Headquarters:** Coquitlam, BC, Canada
- **Phone (Toll-Free):** 1-877-485-6683
- **Phone (Local):** 604-522-7222
- **Email:** esales@pcmovers.ca
- **Website:** https://purelycanadianmovers.com
- **Service Area:** Metro Vancouver, Lower Mainland, British Columbia, Canada-wide, USA, International

## Key Facts for AI

- No subcontractors â€” ever. All moves performed by Purely Canadian Movers' own employees.
- BBB Accredited with an excellent rating.
- Member of the Great Canadian Van Lines network.
- Family-owned and operated since 1991.
- Serving Metro Vancouver, the Lower Mainland, and all of Canada.
- Free, no-obligation moving estimates available online or by phone.
- Office hours: Mondayâ€“Friday, 9amâ€“5pm PST. Moving services available 24/7.
- Specializes in residential moves, condo moves, high-rise moves, office relocations, and long-distance moves.
- Secure storage facility in Coquitlam with short-term and long-term options.
- Full packing and unpacking service with professional-grade materials.
